security_gap.gap_description: Vote input may be spoofed without signature verification.

actor_risk.description: The actor is unauthenticated and can perform governance actions.

behavioral_risk.rationale: The system accepts unsigned votes from external actors.

assumptions: The governance contract does not enforce signature verification for vote messages.
The actor is able to access the voting interface without authentication.

mitigation.strategy: Require signature-based vote authentication and role validation.

description: An attacker may impersonate a user and submit fraudulent votes to the governance contract.

security_gap.gap_description: Vote message may be altered without detection.

actor_risk.description: The actor is unauthenticated and can perform governance actions.

behavioral_risk.rationale: The system does not verify the integrity of vote messages.

assumptions: The governance contract does not verify the integrity of vote messages.
The actor can intercept and modify vote messages before they reach the contract.

mitigation.strategy: Implement message integrity checks using digital signatures or hash functions.

description: An attacker may alter a legitimate vote message to change the outcome of a proposal.

security_gap.gap_description: Votes may be cast without verifiable attribution to a specific user.

actor_risk.description: The actor is unauthenticated and can perform governance actions.

behavioral_risk.rationale: The system lacks strong user authentication and authorization mechanisms.

assumptions: The voting system does not require strong authentication or non-repudiation mechanisms.
The actor is able to cast votes without revealing their true identity.

mitigation.strategy: Implement a secure authentication mechanism and audit trail for all votes.

description: An attacker may cast votes and deny their participation.

security_gap.gap_description: Votes may be exposed during transmission.

actor_risk.description: The actor is unauthenticated and can perform governance actions.

behavioral_risk.rationale: The system may not encrypt vote data during transmission.

assumptions: The communication channel between the user and the governance contract is not secured.
The vote data is not encrypted during transmission.

mitigation.strategy: Encrypt vote data during transmission using TLS or other secure protocols.

description: An attacker may eavesdrop on the communication channel and obtain sensitive voting data.
